title: ErrorRealm
description: This is a texture pack that contains a custom weapon in it by changing the name of the item in the anvil
body:
Rename the texture item, with this texture pack you can get a cool model as seen in the gallery, just by changing the name of the item specified below, to make this texture work you need [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads), but if you use fabric you need a mod called [CIT resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn). although currently CIT reset is not as good as optifine in making this texture work




-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Item rename:
- Sword: All type of sword in minecraft
- Cosmetic: carved pumpkin
- Totem
- Bow
- Armor: Netherite And Diamond Armor


For all rename name you can see in gallery

To make it easier for you to change item names, you can use [RP Rename](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames)
![photo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6b02e9efb1c3559cfa0d07bc0ca6a77ec80e074.png)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------



In the future I will add more weapon models as time goes by, I hope you enjoy it

If you guys found some bug, tell me I will try to fix it as much as I can
[Discord](https://discord.com/invite/tzben5RjK2)
